title: Phthirusa loranthoidea
taxonomy: Phthirusa loranthoidea is a species of mistletoe in the family Loranthaceae. It belongs to the genus Phthirusa and is native to tropical regions. The classification of Phthirusa loranthoidea includes the following: kingdom - Plantae, phylum - Angiospermophyta, class - Magnoliopsida, and order - Santalales. It is a type of hemiparasitic plant that grows on the branches of its host. Its classification is based on its morphology and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
